testcase.name: test_cmd_addpoint_accepts_valid_and_rejects_out_of_range

skipped.message:
GUI backend unavailable: TclError: Can't find a usable init.tcl in the following directories: D:/Anaconda/Library/lib/tcl8.6 D:/lib/tcl8.6 D:/lib/tcl8.6 D:/library D:/library D:/tcl8.6.12/library D:/tcl8.6.12/library
D:/Anaconda/Library/lib/tcl8.6/init.tcl: couldn't read file "D:/Anaconda/Library/lib/tcl8.6/init.tcl": No error couldn't read file "D:/Anaconda/Library/lib/tcl8.6/init.tcl": No error while executing "source D:/Anaconda/Library/lib/tcl8.6/init.tcl" ("uplevel" body line 1) invoked from within "uplevel #0 [list source $tclfile]"
This probably means that Tcl wasn't installed properly.
